title: LEGO Technic Porsche 911 GT3 R REXY AO Racing Car Toy - Model Kit w/ 6-Cylinder Engine, Rear-Wheel Drive and Dinosaur Design - Gift for 11+ Year Old Boys & Motorsport Fans - 42224
seller_info_text: Dispatched from and sold by TheEmpireGB.
features: RACE CAR TOY FOR KIDS – Fuel the fun for kids and teens with this LEGO Technic Porsche 911 GT3 R REXY AO Racing Car toy for 11+ year old boys and girls
DINOSAUR DESIGN DETAILS – Check out the cool dinosaur livery and celebrate a fan favourite in the world of endurance racing with this T. rex-inspired car model building kit
REALISTIC FUNCTIONS – This model car includes steering, independent suspension on all 4 wheels, differential, 6-cylinder boxer engine, opening doors and boot and synchronised air jacks
PLAY AND DISPLAY – Kids can enjoy a rewarding project assembling all the details of this building set, then play with their Porsche model before placing it on display until next time
GIFT FOR CAR LOVERS – This LEGO Technic set makes a fun anytime treat or birthday gift for 11+ year old boys, girls and teenage motorsport fans
DIGITAL GUIDE – The LEGO Builder app guides kids on an intuitive adventure where they can save sets, track progress and zoom in and rotate models using 3D instructions as they build
description: From the manufacturer Build a dinosaur-themed car Epic play for racing car fans Speed into action-packed playtimes as kids build their own dinosaur-themed endurance vehicle with this LEGO Technic Porsche 911 GT3 R REXY AO Racing Car set. Authentic details Recreate an endurance racing icon Check out the dinosaur livery and celebrate a fan favourite in the world of endurance racing with this T. rex-inspired car toy. specifications_table.Manufacturer Warranty Description: If your new LEGO set is missing parts or has faulty parts, LEGO System A/S will replace these parts free of charge through our Bricks & Pieces service. We strive to make this free replacement available in all countries, but reserve the right to change the availability of the Bricks & Pieces service at any time without prior notice.
